title: desmodium triquetrum var. pseudotriquetrum
intro: Desmodium triquetrum var. pseudotriquetrum, also known as the tick trefoil or three-angled tick clover, is a perennial plant in the legume family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which provide various health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating conditions like fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. Desmodium triquetrum var. pseudotriquetrum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
